neotv_hero_description: A free, cross-platform online video search and viewing application
neotv_features_items_0: Huge Resource Aggregation: Search movies, TV shows, anime and variety shows from multiple online video sources
neotv_features_items_1: Native Cross-Platform Experience: Built on Tauri 2.0 with near-native performance for Windows, macOS, Linux, and Android
neotv_features_items_2: Mobile Optimized: UI deeply optimized for mobile devices, ensuring comfortable operation on phones and tablets
neotv_features_items_3: Douban Content Integration: Browse Douban highly-rated movie and TV recommendations with ranking and genre filtering
neotv_features_items_4: Smart Source Selection: Automatically tests and selects the best playback source with HLS video support
neotv_features_items_5: Open Source & Secure: Fully open source with transparent code, no tracking or advertisements
neotv_features_disclaimerText: NeoTV is only a video search tool and does not store, upload, or distribute any video content. All videos come from third-party API search results. If there is infringing content, please contact the respective content provider. The developers of this project are not responsible for any consequences arising from the use of this project. You must comply with local laws and regulations when using this project.
linuxwallpaperengine_hero_description: Another Linux Wallpaper Engine written with Rust and Wgpu
linuxwallpaperengine_features_items_0: Scene Parsing: Reads and parses .scene.pkg files from Wallpaper Engine
linuxwallpaperengine_features_items_1: Rendering: Hardware-accelerated rendering using wgpu (Vulkan + Metal)
linuxwallpaperengine_features_items_2: Texture Support: Handles texture loading with automatic alignment and format conversion
linuxwallpaperengine_requirements_items_: Vulkan Drivers: Ensure your GPU drivers support Vulkan (Mesa for AMD/Intel, proprietary drivers for Nvidia)
MacOS Support: Not fully tested but should work with Metal backend
Wallpaper Engine Assets: Legal access to .pkg files via purchased copy of Wallpaper Engine on Steam
linuxwallpaperengine_aur_hint: For Arch Linux users, available in the AUR as
linuxwallpaperengine_pkg_hint: Requires Wallpaper Engine from Steam for
linuxwallpaperengine_roadmap_items_1: Add support for more shader types
linuxwallpaperengine_known_issues_items_: Highly unstable and under heavy development
Some shader types may not work correctly
Performance may vary depending on hardware
linuxwallpaperengine_disclaimer_items_0: This project is not affiliated with or endorsed by Wallpaper Engine.
linuxwallpaperengine_disclaimer_items_1: Please support the original software by purchasing it on Steam.
linuxwallpaperengine_disclaimer_items_2: This project is licensed under the GPLv3 License.
